parameters.jsCode:
const request = $('Build Agent Request').first().json;
return [{ json: { meetingId: request.meetingId, requestText: request.requestText, contextText: '', contextChunks: [], sources: [], hasContext: false, retrievalError: true } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const sourceItem = $('Build Diagram Prompt').first().json;
return [{ json: { meetingId: sourceItem.meetingId, type: 'answer', text: sourceItem.hasContext ? 'I had trouble generating the diagram. Try asking again with a narrower request.' : 'I do not have enough retrieved meeting context to generate a grounded diagram yet.', diagramCode: null, sources: [] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const sourceItem = $('Build Answer Prompt').first().json;
return [{ json: { meetingId: sourceItem.meetingId, type: 'answer', text: sourceItem.hasContext ? 'I had trouble answering that from the retrieved context. Try again in a moment.' : 'I do not have enough retrieved meeting context to answer that yet.', diagramCode: null, sources: [] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { answer: 'I had trouble answering that follow-up. Try again in a moment.', sources: [] } }];

const body = $input.first().json.body || {}; const meetingId = String(body.meetingId || '').trim(); if (!meetingId) throw new Error('POST /finalize requires { meetingId }.'); return [{ json: { meetingId } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const request = $('Build Finalize Request').first().json; return [{ json: { meetingId: request.meetingId, summary: 'I had trouble finalizing this meeting. Try again when the transcript service is available.', decisions: [], actionItems: [], diagrams: [] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ meetingId: $json.meetingId, summary: $json.summary, decisions: $json.decisions, actionItems: $json.actionItems, diagrams: $json.diagrams }) }}

parameters.jsCode: let item; try { item = $('Parse Finalize').first().json; } catch (error) { item = $('Finalize Error Handler').first().json; } return [{ json: { summary: item.summary, decisions: item.decisions || [], actionItems: item.actionItems || [], diagrams: item.diagrams || [] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }, { inline_data: { mime_type: 'image/jpeg', data: $json.imageBase64 } }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { description: 'I could not describe this screen-share frame.', data: {} } }];
